checks.summary: Docs-only change; no compile or bundle surface changed.
Docs-only change; no TypeScript/runtime source changed.
No repo lint script is defined and modified product files are Markdown docs only.
npm test was skipped because no runtime files, examples, fixtures, inspector behavior, or package files changed.

Doc review found explicit prohibitions on generic sinks executing action descriptors, opening URLs, calling endpoints, running commands, fetching backend resources, mutating product-owned state, or trusting record-provided paths.
Targeted vocabulary search found required plane, role, fanout, result, dedupe, local-first, and inert action descriptor terms in the docs.
Line-numbered manual inspection verified AC1-AC5 and R1-R6 in docs/specs/emitter-sink-plane-contract.md, with supporting cross-links in projection-schema, product-boundaries, and README.
git status, git diff, and source-file search confirmed scope is docs/spec, README, and workflow artifacts only; no hosted API/client, network sink, emitter code, product integration, or UI was added.
Provider/CI checks skipped by risk: this is a local docs-only verification and the repo does not require provider evidence for this documentation change.
